name: testit-cli

metadata.name: testit-cli
metadata.summary: This tool is the command line wrapper of Test IT allowing you to upload the test results in real time to Test IT

documentation:
# Test IT CLI

[![Release
Status](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/testit-cli?style=plastic)](https://pypi.python.org/pypi/testit-cli)
[![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/pypi/dm/testit-cli?style=plastic)](https://pypi.python.org/pypi/testit-cli)

This tool is the command line wrapper of Test IT allowing you to upload the test results in real time to Test IT.
You can see more information in [official documentation](https://docs.testit.software/user-guide/integrations/cli.html)

## Compatibility

| Test IT | Test IT CLI |
|---------|-------------|
| 3.5+    | 0.1         |
| 4.4     | 1.0         |
| 4.5     | 1.2         |
| 4.6     | 1.5         |
| 5.0     | 2.0         |
| 5.2     | 2.1         |

methods.name: testit_cli.autotests_filter.AutotestsFilter.create_filter
documentation: Function returns str of filter by autotests for test Framework run command.

methods.name: testit_cli.filter_factory.FilterFactory.__initialize_gradle_testng_junit4_junit5_filter
documentation: Initialize filter for gradle TestNG or JUnit4 or JUnit5 run with gradle

methods.name: testit_cli.filter_factory.FilterFactory.__initialize_maven_testng_junit4_junit5_filter
documentation: Initialize filter for TestNG or JUnit4 or JUnit5 run with maven

methods.name: testit_cli.filter_factory.FilterFactory.__initialize_codeceptjs_mocha_playwright_filter
documentation: Initialize filter for CodeceptJS or Mocha or Playwright run

methods.name: testit_cli.filter_factory.FilterFactory.__initialize_cucumber_cucumberjs_jest_golang_filter
documentation: Initialize filter for Cucumber or CucumberJS or Jest or Golang run

methods.name: testit_cli.filter_factory.FilterFactory.__initialize_mstest_nunit_xunit_filter
documentation: Initialize filter for MSTest or NUnit or XUnit run
